signals.title: NZD/JPY — G10 Bilateral Theme
signals.text: NZD/JPY at 218.369 — NZD is the week's G10 leader (+1.423%) while JPY lags (-0.516%), creating a 1.939% spread. RBNZ 2.5%. JPY COT LF net short -104,231 remains crowded, leaving the pair vulnerable to carry-trade extensions unless VIX (18.1) spikes above 25. NZD/JPY upside remains the dominant bilateral theme.

signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical Risk + Carry + Vol
signals.text: USD/JPY at 162.415 — Pair holding above the 160.00 intervention threshold as Brent crude jumps +3% on Bab al-Mandab threats. 266bp SOFR-TONA carry advantage sustains the bid despite a -1.37 moderate put skew in 25d risk reversals, signaling institutional hedging against BoJ action. JPY safe-haven function remains impaired (z=-1.88σ vs VIX) as carry dominates the flow.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol + CESI Divergence
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.6984 — COT LF net long +24,098 (63.8%) contradicts a strong negative CESI (-13 misses), suggesting speculative positioning is overextended relative to deteriorating data. IV at 12.2% vs HV30 7.4% (VRP +4.8%) indicates the options market is pricing a significant volatility premium. Risk of long-unwind rises if data continues to miss, targeting 0.6900.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + CESI + ECB
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1443 — COT LF net short -66,057 (34.7% long) aligns with a strong negative CESI (-16 misses), confirming a bearish fundamental/positioning consensus. 146bp SOFR-ESTR carry advantage favors USD. Market expects ECB to hold at 2.25% on 23 July; any dovish shift regarding September would accelerate the move toward 1.1350.

signals.title: EUR/GBP — Retail Sentiment Extreme
signals.text: EUR/GBP retail sentiment at 88% long vs 12% short — an extreme contrarian signal for further downside. This retail long-bias diverges from the broader EUR bearishness seen in COT and CESI data. Institutional flow likely to fade retail attempts to bottom-fish the cross. Watch for retail capitulation to drive a break toward 0.8400.
